message:
feat: enrich policy audit trails, optimize rope operations, and fix event matching

Three interconnected improvements to frankenterm-core:

1. Policy & Audit Context Enrichment (policy.rs, workflows/handlers.rs, workflows/mod.rs)

   When command injection fails at execution time (after policy approval),
   the audit record now preserves the full decision context — which rule
   authorized the attempt, the surface/action/actor involved, and the
   determining rule's history. Previously, failed injections defaulted to
   a bare "allow" decision without any trail of why policy permitted it.

   - InjectionResult::Error variant restructured to include a
     `decision: PolicyDecision` field carrying the authorizing decision
   - DecisionContext (surface, action, actor, rule history, determining
     rule) serialized into the audit record's decision_context JSON field
   - Updated injection_result_error_to_audit_record() test to validate
     decision context preservation in error audit scenarios
   - Fixed config_rule_trace_reason(): corrected field reference from
     rule.message to self.message; switched map_or() to map_or_else()

2. Rope Data Structure Optimization (rope.rs)

   Eliminated expensive string materialization round-trips in all core
   rope operations. Previously, insert/delete/split/concat would convert
   the entire rope to a String and back; now they operate directly on
   the internal node tree structure.

   - insert(): uses split_node() + merge_node_opt() instead of
     to_string_full() → String manipulation → from_str()
   - delete(): same split_node + merge approach, avoiding full
     string round-trip
   - split(): in-place node manipulation via split_node() instead of
     substring-based cloning
   - concat(): direct node copying via copy_nodes_from() instead of
     string conversion
   - Three new helper methods: split_node() (handles leaf/branch cases
     with UTF-8 boundary awareness), merge_node_opt() (merges two
     optional node indices), copy_nodes_from() (recursive node cloning)

3. Event Matching & Test Fixes (events.rs, command_guard.rs,
   command_transport.rs, proptest_policy.rs, main.rs)

   - Fixed variable shadowing bug in match_rule_glob(): renamed reused
     `vs_chars` to `v_star_chars` to prevent overwriting loop state
   - Corrected glob star pattern test: updated expected value for
     "codex.warning" match and added negative test for different
     namespace
   - Updated test data: "codex.warning" → "codex.warn", "bogus" →
     "unknown", added case-insensitive parse_severity("InFo") test
   - Updated WorkflowCompleted test: success: true → false with reason
   - Removed redundant assertions in EventDeduplicator tests
   - command_transport.rs: +191 lines of transport layer enhancements
   - command_guard.rs: minor formatting adjustment
   - proptest_policy.rs: added new property test cases
   - main.rs: minor entry point updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
